notes: WAYBACK-only recipe recipes/pak_pmo_wayback.yml (no live companion possible). pmo.gov.pk is unreachable from outside Pakistan — no TCP connect on 443/80 (curl http=000, geo/firewall block, not a UA/WAF), so there is no live path to author. The IA holds ~1,300 captures of the HTML news detail pages news_details.php?news_id=N (2013-2026, Nawaz Sharif/Abbasi/Imran Khan/Shehbaz Sharif). pagination:wayback probe --spread PASS: 1,319 snapshots, title #right-header-title / text #right-content-body / date #right-header-datetime (English 'Month DD, YYYY') all clean across 2013-2023.
